'''Per Lupelo''' was a cosmopolitan [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Per Lupelo system/Legends|Per Lupelo system]]. It was dotted by a number of clean [[City/Legends|cities]] and bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]], and it was also dotted with a number of [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges. A [[Raze's organization|crime organization]] led by the [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] [[Raze (criminal)|Raze]] had its headquarters on the planet at the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The planet was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and was used as a gathering point for [[Imperial cargo ship|Imperial cargo carriers]] to jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. A [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spy system infiltrated Raze's crime syndicate and slipped the Imperial information to [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Rebel Intelligence]], starting the [[Raid on an Imperial cargo convoy|Battle of Per Lupelo]].
